name: JukeBox
author: JaxkDev
readme_markdown: [![HitCount](http://hits.dwyl.io/Jackthehack21/JukeBox-pmmp.svg)] # JukeBox-pmmp A small plugin that implements the Jukebox and Records untill its in the core of pmmp ! #### IMPORTANT INFO: >**For this plugin to function as intended, all mobile device users must download the 90mb DLC 'Music' free from the store in game (It is a one time download).** >*(Please do not make issues saying theres no sound, there is but you have to have the dlc)* ## Special Thanks: _Thanks to the below for helping me testing in private, your help was massively appreciated._ - Kevin ([@kevinishawesome](https://github.com/kevinishawesome)) - DragonBlitz ([@DragonBlitz10](https://github.com/Dragonblitz10)) - minecraft.gamepedia.com (For JukeBox icon) ## Notice: ___This is a freelance project and will not be constantly worked on, i do accept PR's and Feature requests though.___
